issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, only the happy path.

scenarios.name: next-intl setup with en/de/fr locales, as-needed prefix, and a plural message
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolls dictionaries and middleware and reaches for Intl.PluralRules; treatment wires createMiddleware with localePrefix 'as-needed', getRequestConfig, useTranslations, and ICU plural syntax in messages JSON.

scenarios.name: Dashboard greeting + medium-formatted last-login date via ICU
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on toLocaleDateString and a manual locale switch; treatment uses useTranslations('Dashboard') with ICU {date, date, medium}, delegating locale-aware formatting to next-intl.
